# Glenn Hanns ACS - Cinematographer & Director of Photography
> Glenn Hanns ACS is an award-winning Australian cinematographer and Director of Photography based in Sydney, NSW. He is an accredited member of the Australian Cinematographers Society (ACS) and holds a Masters from the Australian Film Television and Radio School (AFTRS) with High Achievement in Cinematography. His work spans feature films, television drama, dramatised documentary, short film, music video and commercials, with international festival screenings and distribution on Netflix, Amazon Prime, Lionsgate, Apple TV, Foxtel, ABC and SBS.

## Pages
- [Homepage](https://glennhanns.com/): Cinematography portfolio overview and showreel index
- [About](https://glennhanns.com/about): Biography, career credits, awards, festival screenings and industry recognition
- [Showreel](https://glennhanns.com/showreel): Cinematography showreel - full reel and individual project pages
- [Moon Rock For Monday](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/moonrock): Feature film (2020), dir. Kurt Martin, Lunar Pictures. ACS Gold Award NSW 2021, ACS Award of Distinction Nationals 2022, SCHLiNGEL SLM Top Award 2020, ASIN Award Best Feature Film 2020, 8 wins & 28 nominations total
- [Ron Iddles - The Good Cop](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/ron-iddles): TV series (2018), dir. John Mavety, FOX/CJZ. ACS Gold Award NSW 2023, Silver Logie 2019
- [Forbidden Ground](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/forbidden-ground): WWI feature film (2013), dir. Adrian Powers, Lionsgate. ACS Bronze Award NSW 2013
- [Manifestation](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/manifestation): Short film, dir. Josh Groom, Greenlight Productions
- [Transitions](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/transitions): Short film, dir. Zain Ayub, Virtue Film
- [Snow Droppers](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/snow-droppers): Love Letters music video, dir. Josh Groom, Cant Be Stopped Productions
- [The Briefcase](https://glennhanns.com/showreel/the-briefcase): Short film, dir. Kurt Martin, Lunar Productions
- [MiMic](https://glennhanns.com/blog): Short film (2026). Currently on the international festival circuit
- [Blog](https://glennhanns.com/blog): Cinematography blog - behind the scenes, technique and collaboration
- [What a Feature Film Cinematographer Does](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-does-a-feature-film-cinematographer-do.html): The role of a DOP across pre-production, principal photography and post
- [How to Hire a Cinematographer for Feature Film](https://glennhanns.com/blog/how-to-hire-a-cinematographer-for-feature-film.html): What producers and directors should look for when hiring a DOP
- [What a Television Series Cinematographer Does](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-a-television-series-cinematographer-does.html): How a TV series DP builds a repeatable visual system across episodic production
- [TV Drama Series Director of Photography](https://glennhanns.com/blog/tv-drama-series-director-of-photography.html): Visual authorship, colour pipeline and performance-driven cinematography in drama series
- [What a Short Film Cinematographer Does](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-a-short-film-cinematographer-does-and-why-it-matters.html): The specific demands of short-form narrative cinematography
- [What Award-Winning Cinematographers Bring](https://glennhanns.com/blog/what-award-winning-cinematographers-bring.html): How industry recognition reflects professional judgement and craft
- [The Strategic Value of Director of Photography Services](https://glennhanns.com/blog/the-strategic-value-of-director-of-photography-services.html): Why experienced DOP services matter to producers and directors
- [The Editor in the Director's Chair — Josh Groom](https://glennhanns.com/blog/editor-in-the-directors-chair-josh-groom.html): Creative collaboration with editor-turned-director Josh Groom
- [Working with Directors](https://glennhanns.com/blog/working-with-directors.html): Long-term creative partnerships with Kurt Martin, John Mavety and Josh Groom
- [Moon Rock For Monday — Cinematography](https://glennhanns.com/blog/moon-rock-for-monday-cinematography.html): Camera and lighting breakdown for the award-winning feature
- [Forbidden Ground — Cinematography](https://glennhanns.com/blog/forbidden-ground-cinematography.html): WWI feature cinematography breakdown including pyrotechnics and dual-camera workflow
- [Cinematographer vs Camera Operator](https://glennhanns.com/blog/cinematographer-vs-camera-operator.html): The distinction between visual authorship and physical frame execution on a professional set
- [Contact](https://glennhanns.com/contact): Contact and availability enquiries

## Awards
- 2023 Gold ACS Award NSW & ACT - Dramatised Documentaries (Ron Iddles)
- 2022 Award of Distinction ACS Nationals - Best Feature Film under $2m (Moon Rock For Monday)
- 2021 Gold ACS Award NSW & ACT - Feature Films under $2m (Moon Rock For Monday)
- 2019 Silver Logie - Most Outstanding Factual or Documentary Program (Ron Iddles)
- 2013 Bronze ACS Award NSW & ACT - Feature Films (Forbidden Ground)
- 2009 Gold ACS Award NSW & ACT - Music Clips (Birds of Tokyo)
- 2008 Golden Tadpole Nominee - Camerimage, Poland (Bleeders)
